summary: The user sought recommendations for electronic artists similar to Jinsang for studying and discussed their recent experience with high-quality audio streaming. They shared their enjoyment of Tidal's "Master" quality streaming and expressed excitement about exploring more of Jinsang's discography, as well as their recent acquisition of the Arctic Monkeys' album "The Car" on vinyl.
facts: The user has been listening to a lot of lo-fi hip hop and electronic music lately, especially on YouTube and Spotify. The user started using Tidal a couple of weeks ago and is enjoying the "Master" quality streaming. The user has noticed a difference in their listening experience, particularly with Jinsang's album "Life," describing the beats as more crisp and detailed. The user plans to check out more of Jinsang's music, starting with "In Flight" and "Soulection White Label," then exploring "Panacea," "Inflight, Vol. 2," and "Petal." The user recently acquired the Arctic Monkeys' album "The Car" on vinyl and has been listening to it on repeat.
